scripts.name: tools/list
scripts.summary: Enumerate every runnable script + aggregate manifests into registry.json.

scripts.name: tools/retain
scripts.summary: Prune run directories older than each script's manifest.retention_days.

inputs.name: keep-days-default
inputs.description: Fallback retention when no manifest is found

inputs.name: dry-run
inputs.description: Show what would be deleted without touching fs

scripts.name: pi/mcp_bridge
scripts.summary: Reverse MCP bridge: serves scripts.* tools invoked by Pi/others via Zenoh.

inputs.name: pattern
inputs.description: Zenoh key-expr under indrajaal/mcp/request/ (use * for any single segment)

inputs.name: tool-prefix
inputs.description: Only serve tools whose name starts with this

scripts.name: probe/public_interface
scripts.summary: HTTP probe subset of the public interface suite.

scripts.name: registry/saplan_smoke
scripts.summary: Smoke-check the sa-plan CLI bridge: list queues + round-trip a pref.

scripts.name: verify/symbiosis_smoke
scripts.summary: Full-system smoke: Zenoh + Smriti + Fractal + MCP + multi-provider LLM.

inputs.name: pi-tool
inputs.description: MCP tool to invoke on Pi

scripts.name: verify/metrics_roundtrip
scripts.summary: End-to-end proof for the metrics NIFs (counter_inc + histogram_observe + snapshot).

scripts.name: verify/feature_evolution
scripts.summary: Orchestrator: journal + HTML + deck + diagrams + links + email + ZK, all via common libs.

inputs.name: task-id
inputs.description: Sa-plan task id to attach artefacts to

scripts.name: tools/build_nif
scripts.summary: Rebuild the scripts_nif Rust NIF via cargo (no shell).

scripts.name: tools/build_nif_cross
scripts.summary: Cross-compile scripts_nif for arm64/musl targets; install per-arch .so.

scripts.name: tools/guard_no_shell
scripts.summary: Fail if new .sh/.py/.mjs are introduced outside the documented allowlist.

inputs.name: roots
inputs.description: Comma-separated roots to walk (relative to repo)

scripts.name: tools/metrics_dump
scripts.summary: Dump in-process counters + histograms; publish to Zenoh for scrapers.

scripts.name: tools/scaffold
scripts.summary: Scaffold a new gleam-run script with manifest + main/0 + fractal span.

scripts.name: pi/operator_view
scripts.summary: Pi operator live view: tails sa-plan sched-observe --json via streaming FFI.

inputs.name: max-lines
inputs.description: Stop after N events per iteration

inputs.name: iterations
inputs.description: Repeat the capture N times (0 = loop forever, bounded by Ctrl+C)

scripts.name: drift/br_mrg_drift_p0_checklist
scripts.summary: Criticality/FMEA execution checklist + sa-plan status transitions for BR-MRG + DRIFT P0 tasks.

inputs.name: task-id
inputs.description: Target sa-plan task id (required for transition/advance)

inputs.name: plan-id
inputs.description: Logical plan id for run telemetry URN

inputs.name: run-task-id
inputs.description: Fallback task id used for run telemetry URN when --task-id omitted

scripts.name: verify/formal_check
scripts.summary: Runs quint (required) + apalache-mc / tlc (optional) over specs/tla/SchedTele + specs/quint/sched_tele.
